title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!
